_doc: Full backtest data series for the MacroTilt 2-axis engine. Generated by scripts/build_macrotilt_backtest.py from spliced MOVE (1986-2002 proxy via 21d rolling std of DGS10 daily changes × √252, Z-standardized to actual MOVE 2002-2026) and FRED DGS10. SPY returns from Yahoo SPY (1993+) and ^GSPC (1986-1992). Defensive sleeve returns from GLD/SHY/TLT (post-inception) and Fed Funds rate (cash proxy).

regime_only.label: Regime + Cash (de-risk into cash, no sleeve)
